title: Zoom in - new text shows, old text disappears, X disappears
scenario: Zooming in on big blue dots causes old text and the X button to disappear while new description text appears
steps: 1. Open the app or page containing big blue dots.
2. Locate a big blue dot on the screen.
3. Zoom in on the big blue dot.
4. Observe the behavior of the old text (headline, swipe) and the X button.
5. Observe whether new description text appears.
expected: When zooming in on a big blue dot, the old text (headline, swipe) and the X button disappear, and new description text appears.
